experience.role: Product Leader - Global Indirect Tax Technology
experience.summary: Lead product vision, strategy, roadmap, and OKR frameworks for Dell's global Indirect Tax technology platform suite: 10+ internally developed applications processing 300K+ annual tax transactions across 100+ countries.
achievements: Led two cross-functional engineering teams through requirements, PRDs, QA, deployment, and post-go-live support.
Executed zero-downtime migration of 10M+ customer exemption records as part of Dell's global ERP modernization.
Key contributor to Oracle Fusion ERP rollout and migration from on-prem Sabrix to TR OneSource Cloud.
Designed India TCS Compliance Portal for external vendor invoice upload and tax rebate workflows.

experience.role: Product / Business Analyst - Enterprise SaaS Platforms
experience.summary: Delivered enterprise systems across automotive import/export, forestry, retail POS, inventory management, restaurant operations, and cross-border trade clients in South America and Japan.
achievements: Converted business requirements into functional specs, SQL scripts, logic flows, UI designs, and validation workflows.
Led store onboarding, data migration, end-user training, and stakeholder coordination.
Built workflows for catalog, pricing, barcode, fiscal printer, compliance, shipment, and dealer portal operations.

experience.summary: Spearheaded the technology strategy and launch of India's first subscription-based OTT platform, BigFlix, building foundational CMS, ecommerce, CRM, ERP, and POS systems.
achievements: Built CMS workflows for content upload, metadata, pricing, trailers, modules, release scheduling, campaign management, and SQL reporting.
Designed rental subscription, catalog discovery, offer engine, fulfillment, dashboard, and recommendation flows.
Implemented CRM and retail operations workflows across support, ticket routing, segmentation, ERP, and POS.

experience.summary: Supported technology rollout for India's first organized music retail chain, including POS, inventory, store setup, hardware integration, and operations enablement across 100+ stores.
achievements: Implemented Retail Pro inventory and sales management workflows.
Supported store operations, product catalog integrity, and user enablement.
Built early-career foundation in retail platforms, POS operations, and multi-location execution.
